description: Shared golden set for blank-form generation approaches. Each approach worktree applies its technique to whichever documents its category supports.

documents.notes: AcroForm widgets with /V, /AP, /MK BG to be cleared. 7 answer fields, page 0.
3-page born-digital PDF, ~2660 text chars on page 0, 1 image XObject (logo). 42 AcroForm widgets exist but answers are positioned in the content stream, not as widget values. 15 answer fields total.
1-page scan-only PDF (single image XObject covering full page). Zero structural text. Image-fallback techniques only. 10 answer fields.
FUNSD scanned form (762x1000 greyscale). Underline-style answer fields with mixed handwriting + typed text. 5 answer fields.
XFUND German scanned form (2480x3508 RGB). Table-grid layout with light gray borders. 28 answer fields.
XFUND German scanned form with cell-by-cell character input (one glyph per box). 22 answer fields. Stresses image-fallback's ability to operate on tight per-character bboxes.
XFUND German scanned form. 25 answer fields. Different layout from de_train_23 and de_train_2.
XFUND French scanned form with cell-by-cell character input and checkbox markers. 59 answer fields — the densest in the set.
